Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Interface Label

All Superinterfaces:
ModelElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, SVSubstitute, TerminalProgramElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
ProgramConstruct
All Known Implementing Classes:
ProgramElementName, ProgramSV, VariableNamer.IndProgramElementName
public interface Label extends TerminalProgramElement

    getEndPosition()
    Returns the end position of the primary token of this element.

    Finds the source element that occurs first in the source.

    Finds the source element that occurs last in the source.
    SourceElement.Position

    Returns the relative position (number of blank heading lines and columns) of the primary token of this element.

    Returns the start position of the primary token of this element.

      Comment[] getComments()
      Description copied from interface: ProgramElement
      Get comments.
      Specified by:

      Returns:

    • getFirstElement

      SourceElement getFirstElement()
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      Finds the source element that occurs first in the source.
      Specified by:
      getFirstElement in interface SourceElement
      Returns:
      the first source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
      See Also:
      • SourceElement.getStartPosition()

    • getLastElement

      SourceElement getLastElement()
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      Finds the source element that occurs last in the source.
      Specified by:
      getLastElement in interface SourceElement
      Returns:
      the last source element in the syntactical representation of this element, may be equals to this element.
      See Also:
      • SourceElement.getEndPosition()

    • visit

      void visit(Visitor v)
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      calls the corresponding method of a visitor in order to perform some action/transformation on this element
      Specified by:
      visit in interface SourceElement
      Parameters:
      v - the Visitor

    • getStartPosition

      Position getStartPosition()
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      Returns the start position of the primary token of this element. To get the start position of the syntactical first token, call the corresponding method of getFirstElement().
      Specified by:
      getStartPosition in interface SourceElement
      Returns:
      the start position of the primary token.

    • getEndPosition

      Position getEndPosition()
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      Returns the end position of the primary token of this element. To get the end position of the syntactical first token, call the corresponding method of getLastElement().
      Specified by:
      getEndPosition in interface SourceElement
      Returns:
      the end position of the primary token.

    • getRelativePosition

      SourceElement.Position getRelativePosition()
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      Returns the relative position (number of blank heading lines and columns) of the primary token of this element. To get the relative position of the syntactical first token, call the corresponding method of getFirstElement().
      Specified by:
      getRelativePosition in interface SourceElement
      Returns:
      the relative position of the primary token.
